name: Edinburgh Video-Gamers - Drinks and Games!
description:
Come join us for drinks, chat, and of course, video games!

We'll have a tournament on the go on the big screen, and separate games on the go on the smaller screens.

Please keep your RSVP up to date as best as possible, the venue is spacious but we want to make sure everyone gets a chance to attend!
short_description: Drinks, chat and video games at The Old Bell Inn — tournament on the big screen and more.
